zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein於大約1072年出生時，他的父親Adolf von Santersleben II16歲，母親Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg17歲。他和Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1128年11月13日在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登享年57歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

variants.name: Orff
meanings: German: variant of   Orf  .

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Jasvir, Dalbir, Jagdish.  German Alois, Ewald, Gerda.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name, probably from Punjabi məṇḍ ‘skill’. It is based on the name of a Jat clan.
German: variant of   Mandt  .

variants.name: Mandt
meanings: German and Norwegian (of Danish origin): from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal names beginning with Mant-, e.g. Mantwic, formed with Old High German mandjan ‘rejoice’ as the first element.

variants.name: Mander
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Balwinder, Bikram.
English: occupational name from Middle English mander, maunder ‘basket-maker’, a derivative of Middle English mande, maunde ‘basket’. Compare Mand .
German: habitational name from any of the places called Mandern, in Hesse and the Rhineland.

nameMeanings.name: Holstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from the province of Holstein, long disputed between Germany and Denmark. This gets its name from holsten, the dative plural, originally used after a preposition, of holst, from Middle Low German holt-sate ‘dweller in the woods’ (from Middle Low German holt ‘wood’ + sate, sete ‘tenant’). The final syllable has been erroneously altered by analogy with North German Steen ‘stone’, which in South German and standard German has the form Stein.

variants.name: Holstine
meanings: Americanized form of German   Holstein  .

variants.name: Hulstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Albertus, Kees.
Dutch vowel variant of German   Holstein  .

variants.name: Hollstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Hans, Heinz, Klaus, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
German: variant of   Holstein  , or perhaps a habitational name from Hollstein on the Werra River.

variants.name: Holst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Jorgen, Erik, Vibeke, Anders, Carsten, Ludvig, Sven.
North German and Scandinavian: habitational name for someone from Holstein (see Holstein ), a derivative of German Holtsate, Danish Holtsete ‘person from Holstein’.
Dutch (also Van Holst): habitational name for someone from any of several places so called, from holst, hulst ‘holly (forest)’. Compare Hulst .

variants.name: Holsten
meanings: North German: variant of   Holstein   or   Holst  .

nameMeanings.name: Adolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Adelwolf, a compound of adal ‘noble’ + wolf ‘wolf’.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein was born about 1072, his father, Adolf von Santersleben II, was 16 and his mother, Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg, was 17. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein. He died on 13 November 1128, in Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein est né environ 1072, son père, Adolf von Santersleben II, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1128, à Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein um 1072 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adolf von Santersleben II 16 und seine Mutter Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg 17. Er hatte mit Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. November 1128 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein è nato il circa 1072, il suo padre, Adolf von Santersleben II, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein. Morì il 13 novembre 1128, nel Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holsteinが約1072年に生まれた時，父Adolf von Santersleben IIは16歳，母Adelheid Berta von Schauenburgは17歳であった。彼はHildewa Gräfin von Holsteinとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1128年11月13日にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンクレイス ミンデンで57歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンクレイス ミンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein(이)가 대략 1072년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adolf von Santersleben II(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1128년 11월 13일 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein nasceu aproximadamente 1072, seu pai, Adolf von Santersleben II, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1128, em Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein родился около 1072 г., его отцу по имени Adolf von Santersleben II было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein. Он умер 13 ноября 1128 г. в местности крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein nació aproximadamente 1072, su papá, Adolf von Santersleben II, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Adelheid Berta von Schauenburg, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1128, en Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemania.
